item.title: MIUI OS2.0.205.0.VMTMIXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 12 4G Global
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 12 4G Global

Codename: tapas

Version: OS2.0.205.0.VMTMIXM | 15.0

Size: 7.2 GB

MD5: f4fb1070000fc474fd40d7e1d1ba17fd

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to February 2026. Increased system security.
